greeting.speaker: Ruth
greeting.text: Cid! I brought you something. Don't you dare say you already ate.

choices.text: Ruth you didn't have to do that.

grateful.speaker: Ruth
grateful.text: I know I didn't have to. That's why I did it. Now eat.

lifesaver.speaker: Ruth
lifesaver.text: Oh hush. It's just leftover cornbread and some soup. Eat it while it's warm.

already_ate.speaker: Ruth
already_ate.text: No you didn't. I can tell. Eat.

check_in.speaker: Ruth
check_in.text: You sleeping alright? You look a little pale.

tired.speaker: Ruth
tired.text: Make sure you're eating proper then. Body can't rest right on an empty stomach.

dreams.speaker: Ruth
dreams.text: Dreams are just the mind sorting itself out. Nothing to worry about honey.

never_better.speaker: Ruth
never_better.text: Good. That's what I like to hear. You let me know if you need anything.

farewell.speaker: Ruth
farewell.text: I'll come by tomorrow. You need anything from the diner, you just say the word.

greeting_return.speaker: Ruth
greeting_return.text: Bowl's still warm if you haven't finished it.
